# BIMVAA STUDIO

> BIMVAA STUDIO is a Sydney photography and film studio run by Bishal Singh, shooting moody, cinematic stills and film for weddings, portraits and brands across Sydney, by appointment.

## Key facts
- Studio: BIMVAA STUDIO
- Owner: Bishal Singh — photographer and filmmaker (stills and film, equal emphasis, one creator)
- Style: moody, cinematic
- Based in: Denistone East, NSW 2112 (Inner West / Ryde area, Sydney, Australia)
- Service area: all of Sydney; by appointment; available to travel depending on the job
- Services: weddings, portraits, brand & commercial, editorial, events (genre-agnostic)
- Key differentiator: one person shoots both photography and film as a single craft — one consistent look, coordinated coverage, no separate crews
- Pricing: quoted on enquiry, built around the shoot (coverage hours, location, and whether you want photo, film, or both). No fixed prices published.
- Stage: emerging studio, around two years working professionally. No awards, publications, or notable clients yet.
- How to book: send an enquiry with date, location and brief; receive availability and options.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.bimvaa.com/): the studio and portfolio (photography + film)
- [About](https://www.bimvaa.com/about): Bishal Singh's story, approach, and FAQ
- [Enquire / Book](https://www.bimvaa.com/book): booking enquiry form
- [Journal](https://www.bimvaa.com/journal): articles on photography and film

- [How Much Does a Wedding Photographer Cost in Sydney?](https://www.bimvaa.com/journal/wedding-photographer-cost-sydney)

- [Inner West Sydney Photo & Film Shoot Locations](https://www.bimvaa.com/journal/inner-west-sydney-shoot-locations)

## Contact
- Email: info@bimvaa.com (to be confirmed)
- Location: Denistone East, Sydney NSW 2112, Australia
